text.message: What would you recommend I do

but seeing the situation, i dont see anyone on 9 10

So I don’t feeel bad about taking a good trade
me having the spot is the only way to balance the board

It was too good a trade to pass up tho
not sure where the confusion is
oj you fed blue the game

no u are the blòock oj
